description.en: Create a text post container on Threads. Use publish-post to publish it.
description.de: Einen Textbeitrag-Container auf Threads erstellen. Verwende publish-post, um ihn zu veröffentlichen.
description.es: Create a text post container on Threads. Use publish-post to publish it.
description.fr: Create a text post container on Threads. Use publish-post to publish it.
description.ro: Create a text post container on Threads. Use publish-post to publish it.
description.it: Create a text post container on Threads. Use publish-post to publish it.

vars.ACCESS_TOKEN: env:THREADS_ACCESS_TOKEN|Get your access token from Meta Developer Portal

inputs.name: Text

description.en: The text content of the post (max 500 characters).
description.es: The text content of the post (max 500 characters).
description.fr: The text content of the post (max 500 characters).
description.ro: The text content of the post (max 500 characters).
description.it: The text content of the post (max 500 characters).

inputs.bot: The text content of the Threads post. Maximum 500 characters. Can include hashtags and mentions.

success.en: Text container created ({{CONTAINER_ID}}). Use publish-post to publish it.
success.de: Text-Container erstellt ({{CONTAINER_ID}}). Verwende publish-post, um ihn zu veröffentlichen.
success.es: Text container created ({{CONTAINER_ID}}). Use publish-post to publish it.
success.fr: Text container created ({{CONTAINER_ID}}). Use publish-post to publish it.
success.ro: Text container created ({{CONTAINER_ID}}). Use publish-post to publish it.
success.it: Text container created ({{CONTAINER_ID}}). Use publish-post to publish it.
